name: Voronezh Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the hoist band, recalling the courage of the people of Voronezh and the historic Russian state colour
purity and the historic silver field of the Voronezh arms
the golden urn pouring water, the historic emblem of Voronezh

description: A vertical bicolour with a red stripe at the hoist (one third of the length) and a white field, charged at the centre with a golden urn tilted to the hoist pouring water onto a stepped hill, the historic emblem of Voronezh.
history: Adopted on 5 July 2006 by the Voronezh Oblast Duma; the central charge reproduces the principal element of the Voronezh coat of arms confirmed by Catherine II in 1781.

features.symbolism: A red stripe at the hoist (one third of the length) and a white field at the fly, with the central charges from the oblast's coat of arms

features.role: central elements of the Voronezh coat of arms
features.symbolism: a golden inclined urn pouring water onto a hill, the historic emblem of the city of Voronezh granted in 1781, with the silhouette of Mount Bogatyr beneath
